target_backgrounds: AI Engineers or Software Engineers who have built and shipped LLM-powered product features in production
Full-stack or backend-leaning Python engineers with hands-on experience integrating LLMs into user-facing workflows
Startup engineers from seed to Series B environments who have demonstrated strong ownership and fast iteration
Product-minded engineers who can work with ambiguous requirements and translate customer problems into AI features
Engineers from AI-native startups, developer tools companies, productivity software companies, or vertical SaaS companies using LLMs
Former founding engineers, early engineers, or technical leads who have owned features end-to-end
candidate_search_strategy.seniority: Target mid-level to senior engineers as the primary pool, with flexibility for exceptional early-career candidates who have shipped real LLM-powered features. Prioritize candidates with startup ownership, product judgment, and ability to independently deliver quickly over strict years of experience.

boolean_query.boolean_query: ("AI Engineer" OR "LLM Engineer" OR "Machine Learning Engineer" OR "Software Engineer" OR "Backend Engineer" OR "Full Stack Engineer" OR "Product Engineer") AND Python AND (LLM OR "large language models" OR "generative AI" OR GenAI OR "OpenAI API" OR Claude OR LangChain OR LlamaIndex OR RAG OR embeddings OR "AI agents") AND (startup OR "founding engineer" OR "early engineer" OR ownership OR "0 to 1" OR shipped OR production OR "user-facing")

outreach_message.outreach_message: Your mix of Python, LLM product work, and startup-style ownership looks spot-on for an AI Engineer role building user-facing LLM features and shipping fast. Open to a quick chat?

candidate_summary.name: Alex Chen
candidate_summary.fit_reason: Product-minded AI engineer at a startup who has built and shipped user-facing LLM features in Python, with strong end-to-end ownership and fast iteration in ambiguous environments.
candidate_summary.concerns: Specific experience with the company’s preferred LLM frameworks, cloud stack, and seniority expectations is not yet confirmed.
